::: {#Course_Objectives .page-dp3}

1.  [  ]{.text-T7}[After completion of this course you will:]{.text-T7}

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        the advantages and disadvantages of multiple character
        encodings]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        the advantages and disadvantages of
        Unicode]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#More_Course_Objectives .page-dp3}

</div>

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        Unicode character encodings]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        how Unicode is supported by a variety of software
        technologies]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        the issues of deciding what character set/character encoding to
        support in your software]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#Variety_of_Charsets .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Variety of Charsets]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    software industry has not historically paid a lot of attention to
    internationalization]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The U.S.
    had ASCII support -- what else did they
    need?]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Variety_of_Charsets .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Variety of Charsets

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Other
    countries allowed computer vendors or national committees to
    determine the characters to support[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Committees
    and computer vendors defined different methods to store and process
    the characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Some_Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Some Definitions

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Two
    approaches are used to encode large character sets[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Modal
        []{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Non-Modal[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Modal_Encodings .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Modal Encodings

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Modal
    encodings use escape sequences to switch between single-byte and
    multi-byte character encodings[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [abd\\"esc"]{.text-T9}[中国话]{.text-T9}[\\"end-esc"efg]{.text-T9}

    []{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Non-Modal_Encodings .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Non-Modal Encodings

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Non-modal
    encodings use numeric values of the first byte to designate
    multi-byte characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ASCII .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ASCII]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Most people
    are familiar with ASCII:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Letters
        and number and special characters \[a-z\]\[A-Z\]\[0-9\]
        \[!@#\...\]]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Less
        than 127 characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Stored
        in 7-bits/single byte]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_ASCII .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More ASCII

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr9 style="height:9.034cm;width:18.837cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:3.175cm; top:5.927cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Character Type]{.text-T10}  | 1.  [Decimal                     |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |  ]{.text-T11}[Values]{.text-T10} |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Control                     | 1.  [0-31]{.text-T12}            |
|     Characters]{.text-T12}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Space                       | 1.  [32]{.text-T12}              |
|     Characters]{.text-T12}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Graphic                     | 1.  [33-126]{.text-T12}          |
|     Characters]{.text-T12}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Delete                      | 1.  [127]{.text-T12}             |
|     Character]{.text-T12}        |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:9.034cm;width:18.837cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Latin1 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Latin1]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Western
    Europe developed a common set of characters for PFIGS
    languages]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Included
    special characters from those languages, for
    example:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[French -
        èàéù]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[German -
        üß]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Spanish
        and Portuguese -- ç]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    PHIGS languages include:

     

-   -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[P]{.text-T13}[ortuguese]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[F]{.text-T13}[rench]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[I]{.text-T13}[talian]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[G]{.text-T13}[erman]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[S]{.text-T13}[panish]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[(and U.K.
        English)]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Latin1 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Latin1

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}They also
    developed a common character encoding, ISO-8859-1[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Characteristics
    of ISO-8859-1  include:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Less
        that 256 characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Stored
        in 8-bits/single byte]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Japanese .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Japanese]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Japan
    identified the "official" set of
    characters:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Kanji
        -- 1900+]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hiragana
        -- 46 + variants]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Katakana
        -- 46 + variants]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Romaji
        (alphabetic) -- around 100]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Japanese .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Japanese

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}There is no
    way to uniquely store a Japanese character in a single
    byte[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Must choose
    one of two alternative encoding methods to store
    characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Use a
        variable number of bytes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Use a
        fixed number of multiple bytes []{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Japanese .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Japanese

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Different
    platforms chose different encoding methods:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Windows/PC
        -- Shift-JIS (SJIS) multi-byte encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UNIX --
        Extended Unix Code (EUC) multi-byte encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Variety
        of others[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Shift-JIS .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Shift-JIS

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Developed by
    Microsoft (also call MS Kanji, MS Code or SJIS)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Supported
    by:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Japanese
        PC's[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Some
        UNIX systems[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}MacOS-J[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Shift-JIS .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Shift-JIS

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}1 and 2 byte
    character encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Non-modal
    character encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Shift-JIS .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Shift-JIS

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr9 style="height:9.436cm;width:20.742cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:3.175cm; top:5.927cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Character Type]{.text-T10}  | 1.  [Decimal Values]{.text-T10}  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [ASCII or JIS-Roman          | 1.  [33-126]{.text-T12}          |
|     Characters]{.text-T12}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Half-Width                  | 1.  [161-223]{.text-T12}         |
|     Katakana]{.text-T12}         |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Two Byte Ideographic        | 1.  [First Byte:                 |
|     Characters]{.text-T12}       |     129-159]{.text-T12}          |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [                            |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  | ]{.text-T12}[224-239]{.text-T12} |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:9.436cm;width:20.742cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Extended_Unix_Code .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Extended Unix Code

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Extended
    UNIX Code (EUC) is a multi-byte (1-4 bytes), non-modal character
    encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}EUC is
    primarily implemented on UNIX operating systems[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Extended_UNIX_Code .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Extended UNIX Code

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}EUC
    implementations exist for:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Japan :
        EUC-JP[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Taiwan
        : EUC-TW[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}PRC :
        EUC-CN[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Korea :
        EUC-KR[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#EUC-JP .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  EUC-JP

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr9 style="height:9.524cm;width:18.837cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:4.022cm; top:5.927cm; "}
+:--------------------------+:------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Code Set]{.text-T10} | 1.  [First Byte Decimal Value]{.text-T10} |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [0]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [33-126 (Single Byte)]{.text-T11}     |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [1]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [161-254 (Double Byte)]{.text-T11}    |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [2]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [142 (Double Byte)]{.text-T11}        |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [3]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [143 (Triple Byte)]{.text-T11}        |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:9.524cm;width:18.837cm;"}

:::

::: {#Chinese__Taiwan_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Chinese (Taiwan)]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Taiwan
    continues to use the traditional Chinese characters
    (3000-4000)]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Computer
     system vendors chose a variety of different character encoding
    schemes]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Includes
    Big Five and EUP-TW]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Big_Five .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Big Five

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A character
    encoding used on PC's in Taiwan[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A
    multi-byte, non-modal character encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Data is
    encoded in 1 or 2 bytes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

<div>

1.  More Big Five

</div>

+:--------------------------+:------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Code Set]{.text-T10} | 1.  [First Byte Decimal Value]{.text-T10} |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [0]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [33-126 (Single Byte)]{.text-T11}     |
+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [1]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [161-254 (Double Byte)]{.text-T11}    |

::: {#Chinese__PRC_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Chinese (PRC)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The People's
    Republic of China uses a set of simplified characters (still
    3000-4000)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Again, a
    variety of character encodings are used on different
    platforms[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}

:::

::: {#More_Chinese__PRC_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Chinese (PRC)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    character encodings for the simplified characters differ from
    traditional characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

1.  Guo Biao

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A character
    encoding used on PC's in People's Republic of China[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A
    multi-byte, non-modal character encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Data is
    encoded in 1 or 2 bytes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

+---------------------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [1]{.text-T11}        | 1.  [161-254 (Double Byte)]{.text-T11}    |

::: {#Other_Countries .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Other Countries

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Each country
    independently defined a set of characters and encoding
    scheme(s)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Other_Countries .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Other Countries

</div>
:::

+:---------------------+:---------------------+:---------------------+
| 1.  [Character       | 1.  [                | 1.  [Des             |
|     ]{.text-T11}[    | Language]{.text-T10} | cription]{.text-T10} |
| Encoding]{.text-T10} |                      |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| 1.                   | 1.                   | 1.  [Single          |
|   [KOI-8]{.text-T15} | [Russian]{.text-T15} |     Byte]{.text-T15} |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| 1.  [L               | 1.  [Central-Eastern | 1.  [Single          |
| atin2-15]{.text-T15} |     E                |     Byte]{.text-T15} |
|                      | uropean,]{.text-T15} |                      |
|                      |                      |                      |
|                      |     [Cyrillic,       |                      |
|                      |     Arabic, Hebrew,  |                      |
|                      |     Greek,           |                      |
|                      |     \...]{.text-T15} |                      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:9.726cm;width:19.261cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Advantages__Disadvantages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Advantages/ Disadvantages

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Advantage]{.text-T16}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This allowed
    different countries to use computers/software that supported their
    own language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [Disadvantage]{.text-T16}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}It became
    difficult to transfer data from one country to another[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Information_Transfer_Example_#1 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Information Transfer Example #1]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Suppose you
    were transferring data from Western Europe to the
    U.S]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Data
    contained the word "café"]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The U.S.
    software would not know how to process the "é"
    character]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page37 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Information Transfer Example #1

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You can
    build a special character encoding converter that replaces "é" with
    the character "e"[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This
    converter will need to know about all of the Latin1 special
    characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Information_Transfer_Example_#2 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Information Transfer Example #2

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}What about
    transferring information from Japan to Europe?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Data
    contains the word "日本語"[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}European
    software does not know how to process these characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page39 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Information Transfer Example #2

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You might
    build a character encoding converter, but[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}How should
    you convert the word   "日本語"?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}How many
    Japanese words do you need to know to perform a
    conversion?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Information_Transfer_Example_#3 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Information Transfer Example #3

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Suppose you
    wanted to transfer data from a Japanese PC to a Japanese UNIX
    system?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    character sets are the same, but the character encodings are
    different[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page41 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Information Transfer Example #3

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Character
    encoding conversion can be performed[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Character
    encoding conversion requires additional tools []{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Character
    encoding conversion is an additional processing step necessary to
    transfer data[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

<div>

1.  [The Enlightenment:]{.text-T8}[\
    ]{.text-T8}[Unicode]{.text-T8}

</div>

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
