::: {#Introduction_to_Unicode .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Introduction to Unicode]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode is
    a universal character set]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Systems and
    software that use Unicode support:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Characters
        of all major languages, and ]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Characters
        of  many minor languages of the world]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Introduction_to_Unicode .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Introduction to Unicode]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    addresses the information transfer problem ]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode
    software in the U.S. or Europe can process Japanese characters
    without conversions]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Unicode_Characters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Unicode Characters

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr10 style="height:8.466cm;width:10.372cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:8.467cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[English]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Western,
    Central and Eastern European characters]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Cyrillic
    characters]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Arabic
    characters]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr11 style="height:8.678cm;width:10.372cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:13.123cm; top:8.255cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Hebrew
    characters]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Japanese]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Chinese]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Korean]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Indic
    languages]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Many
    others]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Unicode_Versions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Unicode Versions

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}1990 --
    Unicode 1.0 published[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}1992 --
    Unicode 1.0.1 modified to conform to ISO 10646[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}1996 --
    Unicode 2.0 published[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}2000 --
    Unicode 3.0 published[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Current
    version is Unicode 5.0.0[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Unicode_Versions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Unicode Versions

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Each version
    of Unicode adds: []{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        for additional languages and character sets[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Improved
        compatibility with ISO 10646[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    For further information on Unicode, please refer to:

     

       [www.unicode.org]{.text-T19}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Unicode_Consortium .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Unicode Consortium]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Unicode
    character set is defined, evolved and supported by the Unicode
    Consortium]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Unicode
    Consortium is a     non-profit corporation ]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Unicode_Consortium .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Unicode Consortium]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Unicode
    Consortium consists of members:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Corporations]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Organizations
        ]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Individuals]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    For more information about the Unicode Character Set or Unicode
    Consortium,

    please visit: [www.unicode.org]{.text-T19}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Unicode_Conferences .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Unicode Conferences

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.   

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Conferences
    and Seminars provide a wealth of information on Unicode and products
    that support Unicode[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ISO_IEC_10646 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ISO/IEC 10646]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ISO/IEC has
    a standard for a Universal Character Set]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This is an
    international standard, not just an industry
    specification]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Luckily,
    the Unicode Character Set and the ISO/IEC 10646 standard have been
    synchronized!]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#CJK_Unification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [CJK Unification]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[One of the
    difficulties in the Unicode character set is to keep it from growing
    too large]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    becomes a problem when you deal with large character sets like
    ]{.text-T7}[C]{.text-T20}[hinese, ]{.text-T7}[J]{.text-T20}[apanese
    and ]{.text-T7}[K]{.text-T20}[orean]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_CJK_Unification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More CJK Unification

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Although
    these languages started from a common character set, different
    languages may now use different variations of a
    character:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr9 style="height:5.256cm;width:20.107cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.117cm; top:11.853cm; "}
+:---------------+:---------------+:---------------+:---------------+
| 1.  [Wo        | 1.  [Japane    | 1.             | 1              |
| rd]{.text-T21} | se]{.text-T21} |   [Traditional | .  [Simplified |
|                |                |     Chine      |     Chine      |
|                |                | se]{.text-T21} | se]{.text-T21} |
+----------------+----------------+----------------+----------------+
| 1.  ["]{.te    | 1.  [          | 1.  [          | 1.  [          |
| xt-T12}[Countr | 国]{.text-T22} | 國]{.text-T22} | 国]{.text-T22} |
| y"]{.text-T12} |                |                |                |
+----------------+----------------+----------------+----------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:5.256cm;width:20.107cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_CJK_Unification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More CJK Unification

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}One approach
    is to add all of the characters for each individual
    language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Since each
    language has many characters, the specification will quickly
    grow[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_CJK_Unification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final CJK Unification

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Approach
    that Unicode takes is to unify the different character sets
    []{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}One Unicode
    character will represent the same word/idea in multiple languages,
    including:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Japanese[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Traditional
        Chinese[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Simplified
        Chinese[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Characters__Not_Glyphs .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Characters, Not Glyphs]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[When you
    want to display the word "Country" you
    will:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Get
        the numeric representation of the
        character]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Determine
        the language or locale being used]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Find
        the appropriate character glyph for the  language or locale and
        display it]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#CJK_Unification_Problems .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  CJK Unification Problems

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Problems
    arise because:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Unification
        focuses on characters that are common between all the
        ideographic languages[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Some
        countries believe that Unicode does not support all the
        characters used by their language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Precomposed___Decomposed_Characters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:18.838cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Precomposed & Decomposed Characters]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Remember
    that different locales may use different
    keyboards]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Some
    keyboards may have a single key to enter a special character --
    "é"]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Other
    keyboards may need two keys to enter a special character -- "e" and
    " ' "]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Precomposed___Decomposed_Characters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:18.838cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Precomposed & Decomposed Characters]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Remember to
    always do one of the following:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Enable
        your software to process both precomposed and decomposed
        characters as the same character]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Normalize
        the data to put both precomposed and decomposed characters into
        a single, known form]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Special_Unicode_Areas .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Special Unicode Areas

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode has
    two areas that need special attention[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Surrogates[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Private
        Use[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Surrogates .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Surrogates]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    Surrogates area provides a method to exceed the 64K character
    limitation]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Two
    double-byte values are combined to address additional character
    spaces]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Surrogates .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Surrogates

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    Surrogates area was first used in Unicode Version 3.x, when the
    number of supported characters exceeds 64K[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Private_Use_Area .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Private Use Area]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Private
    Use area provides users the ability to support characters not found
    in the Unicode character set]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This can be
    useful in academic or specialized language processing
    applications]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Private_Use_Area .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Private Use Area]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[However,
    applications using the Private Use area may not be portable to other
    Unicode platforms]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Properties .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Properties]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Unicode
    Character Database file contains property information that assists
    applications in processing characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Applications
    need to access this database to utilize the property
    information]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P35 .graphic-pr12 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Properties .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Properties]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode
    supported properties include:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Alphabetical[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Case
        (Upper-/Lower-case)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Case
        Mapping (Upper-case to Lower-case/Lower-case to
        Upper-case)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Combining
        Characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Combining
        Jamo[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Properties .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Properties

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Dashes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Decomposition[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Directionality[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}East
        Asian width[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Ideographic[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Jamo
        short name[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Letter[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Line
        breaking[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page68 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Properties

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Mathematical[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Mirrored[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Numeric[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Private
        use[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Space[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Surrogate[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Unicode
        1.0 name[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Unicode
        character name[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_Properties .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final Properties

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An
    additional list of Character Properties deals with special
    characters (i.e., line boundary and others)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Encodings .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr7 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:7.196cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Encodings]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page71 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Encodings]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[So far, we
    have discussed the character sets supported by
    Unicode]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[How are
    these character sets stored in the
    computer?]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Encoding_Schemes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Character Encoding Schemes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following character encodings are used to store Unicode
    characters:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-16[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UCT-2[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-8[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-7[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UCS-4[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#UTF-16 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [UTF-16]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[UTF-16 is a
    double-byte character encoding:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[One (1)
        character is always stored in two (2) bytes/ sixteen (16)
        bits]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Supports
        Surrogates]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#UCS-2 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [UCS-2]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[UCS-2 is
    also a double-byte character encoding:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[One (1)
        character is always stored in two (2) bytes/ sixteen (16)
        bits]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Does
        ]{.text-T7}[NOT]{.text-T20}[ support
        Surrogates]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#UTF-8 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [UTF-8]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A
    variable-length multi-byte encoding scheme:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Each
    character is stored using 1-4 bytes]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#UTF-8_Bytes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  UTF-8 Bytes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Uses the
    following number of bytes:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr9 style="height:9.202cm;width:16.086cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:5.08cm; top:7.62cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Number of                   | 1.  [Scripts]{.text-T23}         |
|      Bytes]{.text-T23}           |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [1]{.text-T23}               | 1.  [ASCII]{.text-T23}           |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [2]{.text-T23}               | 1.  [General Scripts]{.text-T23} |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [3]{.text-T23}               | 1.  [CJK Phonetics and           |
|                                  |     Symbols]{.text-T23}          |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [CJK Ideographs]{.text-T23}  |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [Hangul]{.text-T23}          |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [Private Use]{.text-T23}     |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [4]{.text-T23}               | 1.  [Surrogates]{.text-T23}      |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:9.202cm;width:16.086cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#UTF-7 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [UTF-7]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A
    variable-length multi-byte encoding scheme]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[8]{.text-T7}[th]{.text-T24}[
    bit of each byte is ]{.text-T7}[NOT]{.text-T20}[
    used]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Needed for
    mail systems where not all nodes may be 8-bit
    clean]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#UCS-4 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [UCS-4]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A four (4)
    byte character encoding:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[ ]{.text-T7}[A
        character is always stored using four (4) bytes/thirty-two (32)
        bits]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Not
        commonly used today because of memory
        usage]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[May
        become more common with     64-bit processors and less expensive
        memory]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Endian-ness .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Endian-ness]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Different
    computer processors use different methods of storing          
     2-byte/16-bit characters:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}["]{.text-T7}[Big-endian"]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}["]{.text-T7}[Little-endian"]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#“Big-Endian” .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  "Big-Endian"

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Motorola 68K
    and 88K and PowerPC processors are "Big Endian"
    processors[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}2-byte
    characters/quantities are stored:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Most-significant
        byte first[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Followed
        by least-significant byte[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_“Big-Endian” .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More "Big-Endian"

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The logical
    value "xFEDC" is stored:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.   

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#“Little-Endian” .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  "Little-Endian"

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Intel
    processors are "Little Endian" processors[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}2-byte
    quantities are stored:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Least-significant
        byte first[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Followed
        by most-significant byte[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_“Little-Endian” .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More "Little-Endian"

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The logical
    value "xFEDC" is stored:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.   

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_Endian-ness .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final Endian-ness

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Moving
    Unicode characters between "Big-Endian" processors and
    "Little-Endian" processors requires a data
    transformation[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page85 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final Endian-ness

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Some
    programming technologies will perform the transformation
    transparently[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Other
    technologies need the developer to explicitly perform the
    transformation[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Byte_Order_Mark__BOM_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Byte Order Mark (BOM)]{.text-T26}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode
    data streams store a BOM as the first code
    value]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[BOM value
    "xFEFF" will indicate the Endian-ness of the
    stream]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr9 style="height:4.219cm;width:12.699cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.35cm; top:12.277cm; "}
+:---------------------------+:----------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [BOM Value]{.text-T12} | 1.  [Endian-ness]{.text-T12}                  |
+----------------------------+-----------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [xFEFF]{.text-T15}     | 1.  ["]{.text-T15}[Big-Endian"]{.text-T15}    |
+----------------------------+-----------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [xFFFE]{.text-T15}     | 1.  ["]{.text-T15}[Little-Endian"]{.text-T15} |
+----------------------------+-----------------------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:4.219cm;width:12.699cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Software_Technologies_Support_of_Unicode .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr7 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:7.196cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Software Technologies Support of Unicode]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Operating_System_Support .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Operating System Support]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following operating systems will be described:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Windows
        95/98/NT/2000/ME]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Mac
        OS]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Solaris]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[AIX]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Windows_95_98 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Windows 95/98]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.014cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.08cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[W95 and W98
    provides some support for Unicode]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Provides
    some interfaces for:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Single-byte
        characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Multi-byte
        characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Wide
        characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Operating
    system does not store or process Unicode
    characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Windows_NT_2000_ME .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Windows NT/2000/ME

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Full Unicode
    UTF-16 support in operating system[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Full support
    for Single-byte,    Multi-byte and Wide character interfaces for
    applications[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Mac_OS .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Mac OS]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Mac OS
    Version 9.0 and later have:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Full
        operating system support for Unicode[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Complete
        application interfaces for Single-byte, Multi-byte and Wide
        characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Solaris_8_AIX_5L .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Solaris 8/AIX 5L]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Full
    operating system support for Unicode UTF-8 character
    encoding]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Application
    interfaces for       Single-byte, Multi-byte and    
     Wide-characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Programming_Language_Support .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Programming Language Support]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following programming languages will be described:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[C]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[C++]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[MS
        Visual C++]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Java]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Visual
        Basic]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}

::: {#C_Programming_Language .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C Programming Language]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.014cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The C
    Programming Language supports data types and functions that can
    process Unicode characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Data
    Types:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[char
        -- Multi-byte data (UTF-7, UTF-8)]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[wchar_t
        -- Double-byte data (UTF-16, UCS-2)]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_C_Programming_Language .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More C Programming Language

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}C has little
    infrastructure on how data is processed[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Correct
    processing of Unicode data must be coded by the software
    developer[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#C__ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C++]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Some C++
    classes (like ]{.text-T7}[wstring]{.text-T27}[) support Unicode
    characters internal to the class]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Remember
    there is still a lot of C code surrounding the C++
    objects!]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#MS_Visual_C__ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [MS Visual C++]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Microsoft
    Visual C++ has a ]{.text-T7}[\_TCHAR]{.text-T27}[ datatype that is
    defined by two symbol values:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[\_MBCS]{.text-T27}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[\_UNICODE]{.text-T27}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This means
    different executables will be compiled and
    tested]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_MS_Visual_C__ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More MS Visual C++

+:---------------------+:---------------------+:---------------------+
| 1.                   | 1.  [\               | 1.  [                |
|  [\_MBSC]{.text-T28} | _UNICODE]{.text-T28} | \_TCHAR]{.text-T28}[ |
|                      |                      |                      |
|                      |                      | Datatype]{.text-T12} |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| 1.  [Un              | 1.  [Un              | 1.  [Sin             |
| declared]{.text-T12} | declared]{.text-T12} | gle-byte]{.text-T12} |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| 1.  [                | 1.  [Un              | 1.  [Mu              |
| Declared]{.text-T12} | declared]{.text-T12} | lti-byte]{.text-T12} |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| 1.  [Un              | 1.  [                | 1.  [Wide            |
| declared]{.text-T12} | Declared]{.text-T12} |     C                |
|                      |                      | haracter]{.text-T12} |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| 1.  [                | 1.  [                | 1.  [U               |
| Declared]{.text-T12} | Declared]{.text-T12} | ndefined]{.text-T12} |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+

::: {#C___Unicode_Libraries .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  C++ Unicode Libraries

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A number of
    providers have developed C/C++ libraries to support
    Unicode:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}ICU
        (IBM)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Rosette
        C++ Library for Unicode (Basis Technology)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Others[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Java .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Java]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Java has
    the following support for Unicode:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[All
        characters are stored and processed as Unicode
        characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Supports
        extensive input/output character encoding
        conversion]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Java .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Java]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Message
    ResourceBundles can be entered as Unicode characters and then
    converted in a separate step to Unicode "escape sequence" characters
    ]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#Visual_Basic .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Visual Basic]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Visual
    Basic programming language specification provides full support for
    Unicode]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode
    support cannot be fully utilized if operating system does not
    support Unicode]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

:::

1.  [Scripting Language Support]{.text-T7}

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following scripting language environments will be
    described:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[JavaScript]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Java
        Server Pages]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Active
        Server Pages]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[VBScript]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#JavaScript .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [JavaScript]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode is
    supported in JavaScript 1.3 and later
    versions]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[JavaScript
    Unicode characters must be in the "escape sequence"
    format:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [\\u4E0B = CJK character "]{.text-T27}[下"]{.text-T27}

    []{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_JavaScript .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More JavaScript

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Remember
    that the character encoding defined for the HTML document must be
    set to UTF-16 or UTF-8[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#Java_Server_Pages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Java Server Pages]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.553cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.846cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Java Server
    pages can specify a character encoding]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Example:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [\<%@ page language="java"
    contentType="text/html:charset="Shift-JIS" %\>]{.text-T29}

    [   ]{.text-T29}[\...]{.text-T29}

    []{.text-T29}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Java_Server_Pages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Java Server Pages]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode
    UTF-16 and UTF-8 are both supported by JSP]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode
    characters can be entered by either:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Using
        an editor enabled to use Unicode]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Using
        the "escape sequence" format]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  []{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Active_Server_Pages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Active Server Pages]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ASP
    supports Unicode characters in scripts and stored
    procedures]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode
    characters are stored using fixed length encodings (UTF-16 or
    UCS-2)]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This is
    because of operating system (Windows NT, ME or 2000)
    ]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#VBScript .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [VBScript]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Unicode is
    supported by VBScript]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[VBScript
    might execute on either the server or the
    client]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    character encoding defined for the downloaded HTML document must be
    set to UTF-16 or UTF-8[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

::: {#Unicode_and_DBMS’s .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Unicode and DBMS's]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following DBMS's will be described:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Oracle]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Informix]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Sybase]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[DB/2
        and SQL Server]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#DBMS’s .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [DBMS's]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T30}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[DataBase
    Management System products from all three vendors support Unicode
    characters]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_DBMS’s .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More DBMS's]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Common
    character encoding is UTF-8 because:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Traditional
        location of DBMS on UNIX Servers]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Minimization
        of space to store the data]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  []{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#DB_2_and_SQL_Server .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  DB/2 and SQL Server

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Both DB/2
    and SQL Server support Unicode[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}SQL Server
    identifies Unicode characters with the "N" prefix[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Unicode_on_Web_Browsers .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Unicode on Web Browsers]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following Web Browsers will be described:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Internet
        Explorer]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Netscape
        Navigator]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Internet_Explorer .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Internet Explorer]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}IE is setup
    by the client to support the local character set, character encoding
    and fonts[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}IE will
    convert downloaded Unicode documents to the character encoding
    defined by the client[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Internet_Explorer .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Internet Explorer

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode
    conversion capabilities were added in Internet Explorer Version
    4.0[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Later
    versions of IE have expanded support[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Netscape_Navigator .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Netscape Navigator]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Netscape
    Navigator added Unicode conversion and other I18n features in
    Version 4.0[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
