::: {#Unicode_and_Mark-up_Languages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Unicode and Mark-up Languages]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    following Mark-Up languages will be
    described:]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[HTML
        (several versions)]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[XML]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#HTML .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [HTML]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[HTML
    originally supported ISO-8859-1 characters for Western European
    languages]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[HTML
    Version 4.0 enabled support for Unicode character sets and
    encodings]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#HTML_Document_Character_Sets .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  HTML Document Character Sets

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Character
    sets/encodings for an HTML document can be defined in the \<META\>
    element[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Specific
    elements can use the [charset]{.text-T9} attribute[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Meta_Element_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Meta Element Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Example]{.text-T16}

-   -   1.  [\<html\>]{.text-T9}

            [\<head\>]{.text-T9}

            [\<meta http-equiv="Content-Type",]{.text-T9}

            [      ]{.text-T9}[content="text/html"; ]{.text-T9}

            [      ]{.text-T9}[charset="UTF-8"\>]{.text-T9}

            [\</head\>]{.text-T9}

            [\...]{.text-T9}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Attribute_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Attribute Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.342cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.058cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Example]{.text-T16}

-   1.  [\<html\>]{.text-T31}

        [\<head\>]{.text-T31}

        [\<meta http-equiv="Content-Type", content="text/html; charset =
        ISO-8859-1"\>]{.text-T31}

        [\</head\>]{.text-T31}

        [European characters.]{.text-T31}

        [\<p charset="Shift-JIS"\>]{.text-T31}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [日本語の字です]{.text-T32}[.]{.text-T32}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [\</p\>]{.text-T31}

1.  []{.text-T31}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#XML .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [XML]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The XML
    specification was developed to support Unicode
    characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Character
    encoding is defined in the XML declaration statement[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#XML_Declaration_Statement .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  XML Declaration Statement

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.13cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.635cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Example:]{.text-T16}

-   []{.text-T16}

1.  [\<?xml version="1.0" encoding= "UTF-8"?\>]{.text-T33}

    [    ]{.text-T33}[\...]{.text-T33}

    []{.text-T33}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    Character encodings supported by the XML Specification include:

     

    -   [Unicode]{.text-T13}

-   -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[UTF-8]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[UTF-16]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[ISO-10646-UCS-2]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[ISO-10646-UCS-4]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.   

    [Other]{.text-T34}

-   -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[ISO-8859-1
        through 9]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[ISO-2022-JP]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Shift-JIS]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[EUC-JP]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Others]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.   

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Mark-up_Language_Reminder .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Mark-up Language Reminder

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Remember
    that the creation of the HTML/XML document may use a character set
    specific to a particular locale[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}May need to
    convert the HTML/XML document to Unicode before it is
    used[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#COM .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  COM

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}COM utilizes
    the [wchar_t]{.text-T9} datatype for character strings[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Wide
    characters are by default Unicode characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_COM .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More COM

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Wide
    characters are usually two (2) bytes in length[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Some
    processors support four (4) byte wide characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Make sure
    all COM components are compiled using the same wide character
    size[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Active_Template_Library .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Active Template Library

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The Active
    Template Library comes in two versions:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}ASCII[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Unicode[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode
    version will only function on Windows NT/2000/ME[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Decisions__Decisions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr7 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:6.349cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Decisions, Decisions]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Choice_of_Character_Set .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Choice of Character Set]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An important
    decision is which character set your software will
    support[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Choice will
    depend on locale and needs of your international
    clients[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Choice_of_a_Character_Set .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Choice of a Character Set

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [General Advice]{.text-T16}

-    

1.  To fully internationalize your software, choose and support the
    Unicode character set

     

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Choice_of_Character_Encoding .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Choice of Character Encoding]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The next,
    more difficult question is which character encoding to
    support[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This
    decision will depend on:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Client
        locale[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Client
        platform[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Software
        technologies[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Choice_of_a_Character_Encoding .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Choice of a Character Encoding

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Many times,
    a single character encoding cannot be supported throughout the
    software[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Analyze your
    product to identify:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Character
        encoding environments[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Data
        transfers between character encoding environments[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Choice_of_Character_Encoding_Diagram .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Choice of Character Encoding Diagram

</div>
:::

 

 

 

 

 

 

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Choice_of_Character_Encoding .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Choice of Character Encoding

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Data
    crossing a character encoding boundary must be converted into the
    character encoding of the new domain[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_Choice_of_Character_Encoding .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final Choice of Character Encoding

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The answer
    is:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [The character encoding choice may be different ]{.text-T36}

    [for each project!]{.text-T36}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Analyze the
    project and make the best decision(s)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>
